# Pagesmith

> File-based CMS centered on `@pagesmith/content`.

## Summary

- Typed filesystem collections for markdown and structured data
- Lazy markdown rendering with headings and read-time metadata
- Diagram rendering through `diagramkit`
- Installable assistant context for Claude, Codex, Gemini CLI, and `llms.txt`

## Quick Start

```ts
import { createContentLayer, defineCollection, defineConfig, z } from '@pagesmith/content'

const posts = defineCollection({
  loader: 'markdown',
  directory: 'content/posts',
  schema: z.object({
    title: z.string(),
    date: z.coerce.date(),
  }),
})

const layer = createContentLayer(
  defineConfig({
    collections: { posts },
    diagrams: { enabled: true, displayMode: 'picture' },
  }),
)
```
